ai_insights.insight: Customer PII exists in multiple columns without masking, increasing exposure risk.
Partial masking is present in 3 sensitive column(s), which may still allow re-identification.
Low sample size reduces confidence in profiling and scoring.
19 high-severity RAID risks were identified, indicating elevated governance exposure.
Inferred relationships across 22 column pair(s) suggest shared identifiers that should be validated for lineage and access control.
